word: H2204 - זָקֵן - zâqên - zaw-kane' - Aged man

sections.paragraph:
Original: זקן

Transliteration: zâqên

Phonetic: zaw-kane'

BDB Definition:

  1. to be old, become old
    1. (Qal) to be old, become old
    2. (Hiphil) to grow old, show age

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 574

Part(s) of speech: Verb
